title: The Allosteric Site
description: Decide which partner provides the most information (maximum entropy) when mixed with the target ingredient.

hints.text: The most informative mix partner for ing1 is the one whose result is most unpredictable — more distinct possible outcomes means more information gained from the experiment, since each result rules out different alchemicals.

Partners ranked by number of possible outcomes:
  ing3: 4 distinct results (G-, G+, R-, R+)
  ing5: 4 distinct results (G-, G+, R-, R+)
  ing6: 4 distinct results (G-, G+, R-, R+) ← most informative
  ing4: 3 distinct results (B+, R-, R+)
  ing7: 3 distinct results (B+, R-, R+)
  ing8: 3 distinct results (B+, R-, R+)
Most informative partner for ing1: ing6.
